scripts.dev:up: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml up -d --build && echo. && echo Development environments: && echo Frontend: http://localhost:5173 && echo Backend GraphQL: http://localhost:4000/graphql && echo Mailpit: http://localhost:8025 && echo MinIO Console: http://localhost:9001
scripts.e2e:smoke-contract:docker: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile e2e run --rm e2e sh -lc "pnpm test:e2e:smoke-contract"
scripts.e2e:journey:docker: docker compose --env-file .env.example -p financy-dev -f docker-compose.yml --profile e2e run --rm e2e sh -lc "pnpm e2e:journey"
scripts.dev:verify:preview: pnpm dev:up && pnpm e2e:journey:docker && pnpm test:e2e:smoke-contract
scripts.dev:verify:full: pnpm dev:up && pnpm test:backend && pnpm test:e2e:smoke-contract && pnpm e2e:journey:docker
